name: AIRLIQUIDE.COM
message: [AI generated] Air Liquide is a multinational French company founded in 1902 and currently headquartered in Paris. It is a world leader in gases, technologies, and services for industry, health, and the environment. The company supplies various gases like oxygen, nitrogen, and hydrogen to a diverse range of industries including medical, chemical, and electronics. It operates in 80 countries, managing numerous R&D projects to aid in sustainable growth.
